name: exam-monitoring-system
description: Professional Online Examination Monitoring System with AI-Powered Proctoring

scripts.build: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm run build
scripts.lint: cd backend && npm run lint && cd ../frontend && npm run lint
scripts.security-check: cd backend && npm audit && cd ../frontend && npm audit
scripts.docker:build: cd backend && docker build -f Dockerfile.production -t exammonitor-backend .
scripts.setup:prod: cp backend/.env.production backend/.env && mkdir -p backend/logs backend/uploads
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install

author: Exam Monitor Development Team
